name: Pick Jesus Tee
description: Choose boldly, wear it proudly—our Pick Jesus Tee is more than just a statement piece; it’s a daily reminder of the greatest decision you’ll ever make. Inspired by Romans 10:13, “For everyone who calls on the name of the Lord will be saved,” this design playfully echoes a familiar “pick” shape while pointing to a life-changing truth: when it comes to eternity, Jesus is always the right choice.
